features.name: package_defined_struct_as_module_port
features.description: Code should include a struct type defined in a package and used as a module input port, with the struct containing packed logic fields
features.snippet:
package pkg; typedef struct packed { logic valid; logic [7:0] data; } my_struct_t; endpackage
module top(input pkg.my_struct_t port_a); endmodule

features.name: protect_lib_package_type_export
features.description: Code should include a protect-lib compilation targeting a module that uses a package-defined struct type as a port
features.snippet:
package pkg; typedef struct packed { logic valid; } my_struct_t; endpackage
module sub(input pkg.my_struct_t p); endmodule
module top; sub u_sub(); endmodule
